title: ALTER TABLE <tbl_nm> ADD CONSTRAINT <tbl_uc1> UNIQUE (col1, col2, col3) causes Assertion failure and abort
poc: create table tab (id int not null, nm varchar(30) not null, dt date, qnt dec(30,10), descr text);
insert into tab (id, nm, dt, qnt, descr) values (2, 'B', '2015-01-29', 3.1415629, 'iasdfhiasdhagdsnfgankkkjfgjklfgjklsklsklsdfg');
insert into tab (id, nm, dt, qnt, descr) select id, nm, dt, qnt, descr from tab;
alter table tab add constraint tab_uc6 unique (id, nm, dt, qnt, descr);
key_bug_features: Adding unique constraint on multiple columns causes assertion failure
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, created_at DATE, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), description TEXT, UNIQUE (id, name));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, created_at, amount, description) VALUES (1, 'Test A', '2023-01-01', 100.00, 'Description A');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, created_at, amount, description) VALUES (2, 'Test B', '2023-01-02', 200.00, 'Description B');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, created_at, amount, description) SELECT id, name, created_at, amount, description FROM test_table WHERE amount > 150.00;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD CONSTRAINT unique_constraint UNIQUE (created_at, amount, description);
